resources.string: Audily needs access to audio files on your device so you can listen to your music. Please grant permission to continue.
Access was denied. Please tap \'Grant Permission\' below, then select \'Permissions\' and enable \'Music and audio\' for the app to function.
Audily needs permission to show notifications so you can easily control your music playback while the app is in the background.
Notification access was denied. Please tap \'Grant Permission\' below, then select \'Permissions\' and enable \'Notifications\' to control music from your lock screen or status bar.
